given: Sentry similar issues formatting receives multiple parent hashes for the same group sorted by best similarity first

should_find.finding: get_formatted_results overwrites group_data for duplicate parent_group_id values, so the first best-ranked duplicate keeps its insertion position but displays the later worse similarity score

notes.body: Regression seed from Sentry fix 4c02626bf661b631ca26883a2919d4f672a35666. get_formatted_results overwrites group_data for duplicate parent_group_id values, so the first best-ranked duplicate keeps its insertion position but displays the later worse similarity score
